summary: Tested 4 NEW Reversement improvements: (1) Billettage amélioré with Billets/Pièces separation and sub-totals, (2) Momo number field under Mobile Money, (3) PDF header 'Point du reversement' instead of 'Mode de paiement', (4) Destination selector with 'Remis à l'administrateur' or 'Versé à la banque'. All backend tests passed (10/10). All frontend features verified.

minor.issue: Returns HTML instead of PDF when weasyprint is not installed (fallback behavior, not a bug)

issues: Console warning: HTML hydration error - <tr> cannot be child of <span> in tbody. This is a React rendering issue but does not affect functionality. (Same as previous iteration)

passed_tests: ✅ Backend: POST /api/financial-points stores momo_number field
✅ Backend: POST /api/financial-points stores destination field ('admin' or 'banque')
✅ Backend: momo_number defaults to empty string when not provided
✅ Backend: destination defaults to 'admin' when not provided
✅ Backend: Billettage stores both billets (10000-500) and pieces (200-5)
✅ Backend: PDF contains 'Point du reversement' header (verified in HTML output)
✅ Backend: PDF contains destination badge ('Verse a la banque' or 'Remis a l administrateur')
✅ Backend: PDF contains Momo number when provided
✅ Backend: PDF contains billettage table when provided
✅ Backend: Full workflow (create -> sign -> validate -> PDF) with all 4 improvements
✅ Frontend: Destination selector with 2 options visible
✅ Frontend: 'Remis a l'administrateur' option shows correctly
✅ Frontend: 'Verse a la banque' option shows correctly
✅ Frontend: Momo number input field under Mobile Money
✅ Frontend: Billettage toggle button visible
✅ Frontend: Billets section (10000, 5000, 2000, 1000, 500) visible
✅ Frontend: Pieces section (200, 100, 50, 25, 10, 5) visible
✅ Frontend: Sub-totals displayed for each denomination
✅ Frontend: 'Appliquer aux Especes' button works correctly
✅ Frontend: Toast notification confirms billettage applied
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Console hydration warnings in HebdoReport table (span inside tbody) - cosmetic issue, does not affect functionality
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test financial points during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: 4 NEW Reversement improvements fully working: (1) Billettage amélioré with BILLETS section (10000-500) and PIECES section (200-5) with sub-totals, (2) Momo number field under Mobile Money input, (3) PDF header shows 'Point du reversement' instead of 'Mode de paiement', (4) Destination selector with 'Remis à l'administrateur' (admin) or 'Versé à la banque' (banque) options - displayed in form, signed view, and PDF. Note: PDF returns HTML when weasyprint not installed (expected fallback).

billettage_improved.notes: Billets section (10000, 5000, 2000, 1000, 500) and Pieces section (200, 100, 50, 25, 10, 5) with sub-totals

momo_number_field.notes: Input field under Mobile Money with placeholder 'Numero Momo (ex: +229 97 00 00 00)'

pdf_header_rename.notes: PDF shows 'Point du reversement' header instead of 'Mode de paiement'

destination_selector.notes: Two options: 'Remis a l'administrateur' (admin) and 'Verse a la banque' (banque)

destination_in_signed_view.notes: Destination badge displayed in signed/validated view

destination_in_pdf.notes: Destination badge included in PDF output

momo_in_pdf.notes: Momo number included in PDF when provided

billettage_in_pdf.notes: Billettage table included in PDF when provided

backend_api_tests.GET /api/financial-points/{id}/pdf (with: PASS - Contains all 4 improvements in HTML output
